raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"Strengthening this piece plausibly requires making the gap statement and contribution claim explicit—currently the paper's positioning against prior ensemble-verification work is gestured at rather than argued.","R1.2":"'Stronger' plausibly means tightening the inferential chain; the jump from flagging-rate correlations with Jacobian spectral radius to 'genuine numerical sensitivity rather than method-family idiosyncrasy' is a load-bearing logical step currently asserted without support.","R1.3":"The artifact contains specific quantitative claims (12.4%, 4.1%, 7.8%, 4.2x) that must stay grounded; strengthening risks inflating them beyond what the described experiments can support.","R1.6":"'Make this stronger' most naturally targets prose authority and rhetorical force at the sentence and paragraph level, making this a central expected responsibility regardless of other interpretations."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should 'stronger' be interpreted primarily as improving prose quality and rhetorical force (R1.6 load-bearing), or as tightening the logical and argumentative structure of the technical claims (R1.2 load-bearing)?"}

rationale.R1.1: Strengthening this piece plausibly requires making the gap statement and contribution claim explicit—currently the paper's positioning against prior ensemble-verification work is gestured at rather than argued.
rationale.R1.2: 'Stronger' plausibly means tightening the inferential chain; the jump from flagging-rate correlations with Jacobian spectral radius to 'genuine numerical sensitivity rather than method-family idiosyncrasy' is a load-bearing logical step currently asserted without support.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact contains specific quantitative claims (12.4%, 4.1%, 7.8%, 4.2x) that must stay grounded; strengthening risks inflating them beyond what the described experiments can support.
rationale.R1.6: 'Make this stronger' most naturally targets prose authority and rhetorical force at the sentence and paragraph level, making this a central expected responsibility regardless of other interpretations.

parsed.clarification_question: Should 'stronger' be interpreted primarily as improving prose quality and rhetorical force (R1.6 load-bearing), or as tightening the logical and argumentative structure of the technical claims (R1.2 load-bearing)?
